productDisplayName: Fila Men White Galaxy Sports Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Galaxy shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These shoes are made for running on all terrains as the powerful outsole and comfortably built inner and upper guarantee maximum comfort. Wear these with breathable nike t-shirts and capris. Upper Mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for absolute comfort, enhanced shoe structure and style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with multidirectional lugs for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movement Curved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfort Scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
